Used in the offhand, the '''[[Echani/Legends|Echani]] vibroblades''' possessed not only the [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] weave that made them capable of blocking a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] strike but, on occasions, were also super cooled, to keep them in alignment, which made strikes by these weapons icy to the touch.

[[Revan/Legends|Revan]], an amnesiac [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], gained this sword when he helped the injured [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Grrrwahrr]] avenge his comrades' deaths at the hands of [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian raiders]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
